title: Startup Timer
description: Make a notification and sound when Minecraft finishes loading, letting you know when and exactly how long Minecraft took to load!
body: # Startup Timer Allows displaying a notification (using Minecraft's built in toasts) letting you know how long Minecraft took to load. Also plays a "Ding!" sound upon loading to let you know when it is finished! Both of these can be individually turned on/off in the config! This mod is based off of [ZhuRuoLing's Startup Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/startup-time) but updated and with new features.
